profile.name: Anant Singh
profile.tagline: I turn ideas into words that move people - and brands into voices people trust.
profile.specialization: Business Developer · Video Editing · Software Developer · Ghostwriting
profile.bio:
I don't just edit videos or write code - I help founders and creators show up online in a way that actually works. I've built full-stack web apps, and managed LinkedIn presence for business owners who don't have time to figure it out themselves.
 I'm an MCA graduate from Lucknow working at the intersection of business development, content, and technology. Whether it's a reel that needs to hook in two seconds, a website that needs to load fast and convert, or a LinkedIn post that sounds like you - I bring the same level of attention to all of it. 
 Currently a BD Intern at FileMyFirm. Freelancing on the side. Building my own thing in parallel.

experience.summary: Driving client acquisition and outreach for a legal and compliance services firm, supporting both business growth and digital presence.
highlights: Drive client acquisition and manage outreach pipelines for legal and compliance services
Identify and qualify potential leads, coordinating with team to convert prospects into clients
Support digital presence and marketing initiatives to enhance brand awareness

experience.role: Freelance Video Editor & Social Media Manager
experience.summary: Full-service content and creative work for founders, creators, and brands - from video editing to LinkedIn ghostwriting and social strategy.
highlights: Edited 9+ videos for a 500K+ Instagram educational creator; one reel hit 4M+ views, growing account significantly within 2–3 days; others average 300K views
Specialized in CapCut (Windows) with keyframe-animated captions, SFX/BGM selection, and compound clip structures
Managed LinkedIn accounts and ghostwriting for clients - posts, carousels, and content strategy targeting founders and business audiences
Designed social media graphics and brand assets using Canva and Figma

experience.summary: Built and optimized high-performance WordPress websites, handling everything from SEO to copywriting and front-end customization.
highlights: Architected high-performance websites using Elementor to extend core site functionality
Optimized search visibility and site speed via advanced on-page SEO, caching strategies, and performance tuning
Authored targeted copywriting for landing pages; modified templates with HTML/CSS/JS to improve conversion rates
Collaborated with design and marketing teams to translate brand guidelines into responsive, user-friendly web designs

experience.summary: Produced branded video content and built responsive WordPress layouts while analyzing performance data to refine content strategies.
highlights: Produced high-engagement scripts and branded video content driving measurable increases in audience engagement
Developed responsive, SEO-friendly WordPress layouts and managed theme/plugin updates to improve UX
Designed custom thumbnails and motion graphics in Canva, maintaining visual consistency across social platforms
Analyzed performance data to refine storytelling techniques for short-form campaigns

experience.summary: Engineered interactive, responsive web pages using Angular and TypeScript, integrating RESTful APIs and collaborating with UI/UX designers.
highlights: Engineered interactive web pages using Angular and TypeScript, ensuring full responsiveness across devices
Streamlined data management by integrating RESTful APIs to display and handle dynamic data
Translated Figma designs into user-friendly interfaces in collaboration with UI/UX designers
Adopted Agile practices and participated in peer code reviews for efficient team collaboration

testimonials.quote: Anant picks up your style fast and actually brings ideas you wouldn't have thought of yourself. Going to be interesting watching where he takes things
testimonials.name: Harsh Vijay Shrivastava

testimonials.quote: Works quickly, adapts to the brief, and doesn't need to be told twice. The kind of person you want in your corner when you're trying to grow.
testimonials.name: Paras Atal

testimonials.quote: Sharp brain, picks things up faster than most. Didn't need much hand-holding - just got on with it and figured things out.
testimonials.name: FileMyFirm

services.title: Video Editing
services.description: Long-form YouTube edits and short-form Reels / Shorts with narrative pacing, motion graphics, colour grading, and thumbnail strategy. Built for retention and visual identity.

services.title: Content Strategy
services.description: Full-spectrum content planning from audience research to editorial systems. I build the architecture your content operation runs on - so you always know what to publish, when, and why.

services.title: Ghostwriting
services.description: Long-form articles, LinkedIn posts, newsletters, and thought leadership that sound exactly like you - only sharper. Your ideas, your voice, my craft.

services.title: Scriptwriting
services.description: YouTube scripts, short-form video hooks, and educational content designed for watch time and retention. I write for how people actually watch, not how you imagine they do.
